Title: Add default recipient for notification
Steps:
1. Navigate to Notifications
2. Select a notification type
3. Add default recipient email
4. Save

Title: Notification added to feed
Steps:
1. Trigger a notification event (e.g. new order)
2. Navigate to Notification feed

Title: Registration notification template
Steps:
1. Register a new user on storefront
2. Check email inbox

Title: Registration invitation notification
Steps:
1. Send registration invitation from Admin
2. Check recipient email inbox

Title: Password reset notification
Steps:
1. Request password reset on storefront
2. Check email inbox

Title: Password reset limit enforcement
Steps:
1. Request password reset multiple times exceeding limit
2. Attempt another reset

Title: Email confirmation notification
Steps:
1. Register new user or change email
2. Check inbox for confirmation email

Title: Two-factor authentication email
Steps:
1. Login with 2FA-enabled account
2. Check email for verification code

Title: Organization registration notification
Steps:
1. Register a new organization on storefront
2. Check admin/email notifications

Title: Enable abandoned cart notifications (global)
Steps:
1. Navigate to Settings > Notifications
2. Enable abandoned cart notifications globally
3. Save

Title: Trigger abandoned cart email after default time
Preconditions: Abandoned cart notifications enabled; cart exists
Steps:
1. Create a cart with items
2. Wait for default reminder time (5 days or configured)
3. Check email

Title: Custom reminder time for abandoned cart
Steps:
1. Navigate to abandoned cart settings
2. Set custom reminder time
3. Save and trigger

Title: Create order notification
Steps:
1. Create a new order
2. Check email for order confirmation

Title: Cancel order notification
Steps:
1. Cancel an existing order
2. Check email for cancellation notification

Title: Order paid notification
Steps:
1. Mark order payment as Paid
2. Check email

Title: Order sent notification
Steps:
1. Change shipment status to Sent
2. Check email

Title: Invoice notification for customer
Steps:
1. Generate invoice for an order
2. Check customer email

Title: Shipment status change notification - PickPack
Steps:
1. Change shipment document status to PickPack
2. Check notification

Title: Shipment status change notification - Sent
Steps:
1. Change shipment document status to Sent
2. Check notification

Title: Payment status change notification - Paid
Steps:
1. Change payment document status to Paid
2. Check notification

Title: Payment status change notification - Refunded
Steps:
1. Change payment document status to Refunded
2. Check notification

Title: SMS notification - phone number change
Steps:
1. Configure SMS notification gateway
2. Trigger phone number change event
3. Check SMS delivery

Title: SMS notification - two-factor authentication
Steps:
1. Configure SMS as 2FA method
2. Login with 2FA-enabled account
3. Check SMS

Title: Predefined notification - edit and restore
Steps:
1. Open predefined notification
2. Edit template content
3. Save
4. Click Restore

Title: Send edited predefined template
Steps:
1. Edit predefined template
2. Send to test email

Title: Notification Attachment — No Attachment
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Notification template exists without attachments
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${BACK_URL}/notifications
2. Select a notification type that has no attachments configured
3. Open the notification template details blade
4. Verify the Attachments widget or section is visible
5. Verify the attachment list is empty
6. Verify the UI indicates the no-attachment state clearly (e.g., empty state message)
7. Send a test notification from this template
8. Verify the received email has no file attachments
